_README: REFERENCE NOTES for .claude/settings.json under the meta/envctl env model (ADR-0006) — NOT the live file. meta/envctl IS the user-global env manager: envctl/home/ is the canonical home tree and $HOME paths are SYMLINKS into it ('real file in meta, symlink outside, never the reverse'). Consequences: (1) the 'env' block is meta-controlled and legitimate — env.CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS is INTENTIONAL and must NEVER be dropped; (2) 'enabledPlugins'/'extraKnownMarketplaces' are meta's own Claude plugin system, NOT drift; (3) functional hooks are KEPT (never-downgrade) — repo-relative scripts/hooks/* AND the user-global ruvector/ccg/gitnexus/global hooks. The ONLY portability concern is hardcoded absolute /home/<user>/ paths inside string VALUES (statusline, plugin marketplaces, hook commands): the sanctioned fix is a TEMPLATE/SUBSTITUTION pass at link time (see envctl/home/.claude/settings.json.tmpl with ${META_ROOT}), or portable forms ($HOME/, ~/, %APPDATA%) where the consumer expands them — an UPGRADE, never a trim/drop. claude-settings-doctor.js REPORTS that residue to track the template follow-up; it never edits the live file.

env._note: Meta-controlled (envctl). CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS is intentional — keep it. Render machine-specific values (e.g. META_ROOT) from the envctl template, not by hand.

enabledPlugins._note: meta's Claude plugin system — legitimate, not drift. Keep.

extraKnownMarketplaces._note: meta plugin marketplaces. Hardcoded /home/<user>/ source.path values are portability RESIDUE → fix via the envctl template-substitution pass (ADR-0006), never drop. Claude Code reads source.path directly (no shell expansion), so portabilize only via a render step that emits the correct per-host path.

hooks._note: Hooks are KEPT (never-downgrade). Repo-relative hooks (scripts/hooks/*.sh) — incl. the ICM architecture-memoir injection (icm-architecture-inject.sh on SessionStart+PreCompact) — live in the tracked file. User-global hooks (ruvector/ccg/gitnexus/global/*) reference ~/.claude/... (the envctl-symlinked home) using the portable ~/ form the shell expands. The entries below are the umbrella's OWN repo-relative hooks and are always valid.
